name: Chronicle 2.0
tagline: AI-powered presentation builder that produces polished decks without the generic, over-designed AI aesthetic.
problem: Most AI presentation tools generate visually cluttered or templated slides that look instantly artificial, undermining credibility in professional settings. Chronicle 2.0 addresses this by giving users AI assistance that enhances their own content and style rather than overriding it. The result is faster deck creation without sacrificing the human judgment that makes presentations compelling.
useCases: Building investor pitch decks with a refined, non-generic visual style
Creating client-facing proposals and status updates quickly
Producing internal team presentations that maintain brand consistency
Repurposing written reports or documents into structured slide narratives
